nasb.text: Now David knew that Saul was plotting evil against him; so he said to Abiathar the priest, “Bring the ephod here.”

esv.text: David knew that Saul was plotting harm against him. And he said to Abiathar the priest, “Bring the ephod here.”

cnv.text: 大衛知道掃羅設計害他，就對亞比亞他祭司說：“把以弗得拿來！”

ccb.text: 大卫知道了扫罗的计谋，便吩咐祭司亚比亚他把以弗得带来，
